memoryArtifacts.headline: Isabel Sibbald
memoryArtifacts.description:
https://www.thepeerage.com/p10956.htm#i109555
  Isabel Sibbald was the daughter of Sir John Sibbald.1 She married, firstly, George Douglas, 4th Earl of Angus, son of William Douglas, 2nd Earl of Angus …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Sibbald於1415年出生在蘇格蘭費伏格倫洛斯時，她的父親Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie16歲，母親Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie10歲。她於1446年之前與George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest在蘇格蘭費伏馬爾金其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1497年2月21日在蘇格蘭藍納可爾享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Sibbald于1415年出生在苏格兰費伏格倫洛斯时，她的父亲Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie16岁，母亲Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie10岁。她于1446年之前与George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest在苏格兰費伏馬爾金其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1497年2月21日在苏格兰藍納可爾享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sibbald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and Midlothian) and northern English: from the Middle English and Scots personal name Sybald, Sibald (Old English Sǣbeald, from sǣ ‘sea’ + beald ‘brave’, or more likely Sigebeald, with sige ‘victory’ as the first element). The name was reinforced in the early Middle Ages by the Norman introduction of an ancient Germanic cognate, in its French form Sibaud.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Sibbald was born in 1415, in Glenrothes, Fife, Scotland, her father, Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie, was 16 and her mother, Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie, was 10. She married George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest before 1446, in Markinch, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 21 February 1497, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 82.

fr.Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Sibbald est née en 1415, à Glenrothes, Fife, Écosse, son père, Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest avant 1446, à Markinch, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 février 1497, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Sibbald 1415 in Glenrothes, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie 16 und ihre Mutter Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie 10. Sie hat vor 1446 in Markinch, Fife, Scotland George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Februar 1497 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Lanarkshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Sibbald è nata il nel 1415 nel Glenrothes, Fife, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest prima del 1446, nel Markinch, Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 21 febbraio 1497, nel Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Sibbaldが1415年にスコットランドフィフグレンロススで生まれた時，父Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonieは16歳，母Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonieは10歳であった。1446年以前にスコットランドフィフマーキンチでGeorge Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forestと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1497年2月21日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアで82歳で死去した。

ko.Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 압어네시
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Sibbald(이)가 1415년 스컷랜드 피프 글렌로트스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 1446년 이전 스컷랜드 피프 마킨치에서 George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 2월 21일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Sibbald nasceu em 1415, em Glenrothes, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest antes 1446, em Markinch, Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de fevereiro de 1497, em Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 82 anos.

ru.Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: абирнети, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Sibbald родилась в 1415 г. в местности гленротесь, фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest перед 1446 г. в местности маркинч, фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 21 февраля 1497 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.Callendar, Stirlingshire, Scotland: Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Sibbald nació en 1415, en Glenrothes, Fife, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie, tenía 10 años. Se casó con George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest antes de 1446, en Markinch, Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 21 de febrero de 1497, en Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 82 años.
